meta.description: A modern, minimalist jewelry store targeting contemporary consumers with a clean, high-fashion aesthetic. The design relies heavily on stark photography, muted neutral backgrounds, and precise, delicate typography to convey a sense of understated luxury and craftsmanship.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
fonts.display: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: Header is overlaid on the hero image, making text white for contrast. Logo is dead center. Navigation on left, icons (search, user, cart) on right.

footer.notes: Clean multi-column layout. 4 link columns (About, Support, Connect, Legal). Newsletter signup below with minimal styling (bottom border input, text button). Bottom area has copyright and region selector.

productCard.notes: Very clean, minimal cards. Square images with a very light grey/off-white background. Title and price left-aligned below image. No visible border or heavy shadow. 'Sold out' items use strikethrough text.

productGrid.notes: Tight grid with very minimal gap (approx 4px or less) between product images, giving a slightly editorial, continuous feel.

sections.name: announcement-bar
sections.layout: Full width, centered text, single line

design.styling: No border, minimal padding (py-1 or py-2)

content.headline: Promotional shipping announcement
content.specialElements: Standard scrolling or static text banner

sections.notes: Sits at the very top of the page above the header.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full bleed, 2-column split image layout filling the viewport height

design.styling: No visible margins, images touch edges

content.cta: Single white rectangular button placed centrally at the bottom of the section, dark text, sharp square corners (0rem radius).

media.description: Two distinct lifestyle images placed side-by-side. Left shows close-up of textured earrings on a warm background. Right shows a model wearing a pendant necklace against a light textured garment.

sections.name: product-grid-new
sections.layout: CSS Grid 4 equal columns with minimal gap, 2 rows

design.text: Dark foreground, small sans-serif font for title and price
design.styling: No borders around cards, images sit flush with tight spacing

content.cta: 'View all' link centered below the grid with an arrow.

media.description: Clean product shots on light neutral grey backgrounds. Focus entirely on the jewelry items (rings, necklaces, earrings).

sections.notes: Very stark and minimal presentation. Focus is entirely on the product forms.

sections.name: featured-collection

content.cta: Single white rectangular button placed centrally at the bottom, dark text, sharp square corners (0rem).

media.description: Side-by-side layout. Left: Model wearing black top and jewelry. Right: Close up flat lay of shiny silver jewelry pieces on a muted olive green background.

sections.notes: Serves as a visual break between product grids.

sections.name: product-grid-bestsellers
sections.layout: CSS Grid 4 equal columns with minimal gap, 2 rows

content.cta: 'View all' link centered below the grid with an arrow.

media.description: Consistent clean product photography on light grey backgrounds.

sections.notes: Structurally identical to the first product grid.

sections.name: brand-story-split
sections.layout: 2-column grid, 50/50 split. Images on top, text below each image respectively.

design.text: White text overlaid on images for title. Dark text for descriptions below.
design.styling: Images touch edges. Text blocks have ample padding.

content.headline: Bold white text centered over each image (e.g., 'ABOUT US', 'VISIT US')
content.body: Short, single-paragraph descriptions below each image explaining craftsmanship or studio visits.
content.cta: Text link with arrow below each paragraph (e.g., 'BRAND NAME ->', 'SHOP IN STUDIO ->')

media.description: Two black and white lifestyle/behind-the-scenes images. Left: Hands working on jewelry with tools. Right: Flat lay of tools and jewelry pieces on a table.

sections.notes: Provides brand context and an invitation to physical locations. The black and white photography adds to the editorial feel.
